category_sources: Official GitHub README at https://github.com/umlet/umlet says UMLet is an open-source UML tool for drawing diagrams fast.
display_name_sources: Official website and README use "UMLet" at https://www.umlet.com/ and https://github.com/umlet/umlet.
docs_sources: Official FAQ at https://www.umlet.com/faq.htm documents starting UMLet, editing diagrams, exports, and command-line conversion.
Official README points users to the GitHub Wiki for frequently asked questions.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty, so repo was determined from the official GitHub repository https://github.com/umlet/umlet, whose README links to www.umlet.com and describes UMLet.
tags_sources: Official README says UMLet draws UML diagrams and exports eps, pdf, jpg, svg, and clipboard.
source_facts.description says UML tool for creating UML diagrams.
